title: Voyage to the End of the Universe
overview: The year is 2163. Starship Ikaria XB 1 embarks on a mission deep into space in search of alien life.  During their perilous journey the crew confront the effects of a malignant dark star, the destructive legacy of the 20th century and, ultimately, the limits of their own sanity.
